title: charybdis hesperia
intro: Charybdis hesperia, also known as sea lavender or rosemary-leaved sea lavender, is a flowering plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. Its leaves and flowers have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Charybdis hesperia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and promoting respiratory health. Charybdis hesperia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
